storyInfo: Lucky Cystybeast is allowed to stay on Propeller Paradise with Gordon Tannen's help, but Sky Jagger realizes that something is not right. Meanwhile, the two fugitives are accidentally dropped into Gordon's secret collection room, where he hides the contraband that he uses to help Lucky Cystybeast and other corporations.

attributes.content: Survival of the fittest, culling of the unfit... since when has Rhine become one of the 'unfit'?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Oh... Mr. Jagger! What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: That's my line. What are you doing here, when you should have already cancelled Lucky Cystybeast's registration?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: I'm not doing anything illegal! We solved our technical issues before we filed the cancellation. What a stroke of luck...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: You solved it? Why didn't anyone contact Engineering?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Maybe word didn't have time to get around because of how sudden it was...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: A-Anyway, Mr. Tannen announced that all technical inspections by Rhine Lab are suspended.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I don't need to report to you anymore.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: How could they have solved it all of a sudden, when three days didn't do it?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The Lucky Cystybeast's luck?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Quick, take the readings before their people come back.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: All the data is good. Too good, in fact. It's almost as if they were specifically calibrated to the benchmarks.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Wait... these aren't Propeller Paradise standard-issue screws, are they?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: They're completely soldered. Won't budge... the whole core energy module is sealed shut.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: But no power unit on Propeller Paradise sounds like this. No legal power unit, anyway.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Where did they get this weird non-compliant stuff from? I thought all procurement on Propeller Paradise goes through—
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Ah... I get it now. Silly me, for thinking that survival of the fittest was really the rule on Propeller Paradise.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Still helping that bastard put together the report for the accident at Rhine?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Forget it. Director Lunorey would just dismiss me for not having evidence.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Who else can help...?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: My ride will be there in five minutes. I'll bring you a Propeller Paradise mascot plushie if I find one.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'm not a kid.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: See you later, then?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You've been playing catch with your 'branches' in the corridor ever since you stepped out of Saria's office.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: You're stalling. I can tell.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: There really ought to be a law about invading an individual's privacy with a water clone.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Not likely to happen, unless there's another Water Elf in Columbia.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: The 'branches' on Nasti's belt suddenly grow, pointing in the direction of the Water Elf, and twist open a tool attachment.
As though rehearsed a thousand times, Muelsyse takes a step to the right, dodging the bionic branch robot's trick.
You know I'm stuck in Kjerag and can't come in person.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Maintaining a water clone at long distance is a draining task. Are you so worried that I might flub up Kristen's legacy?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It's you that I'm worried about, not some derivative of Galleria Stellaria.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: It takes time for a seed to grow into a sapling, and all the more so when you hope it will become a towering tree.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Relax. Not even Ferdinand would complain about the results you're pulling.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: That's because I blocked his email.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Ahem...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: You helped make Kristen's dreams come true by digging away under the Trimounts suburbs. Now it's your turn.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Have you ever thought about...?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I'm not going back to the Convallis.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The serene tranquility of the Convallis does not belong to a flawed Banshee, nor can it inspire her.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: It's time to go.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Just a sec. Here.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: A potted plant?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Ecological dug it out of the desert. It's resistant to heat and cold, and just as stubborn as you... call it a goodbye prezzie.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: No need for vivariums, just remember to water it. It'll keep a watchful eye on you... maybe even help you.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: In return, take care of the vivarium and yourself, and—
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Get me a Propeller Paradise mascot plushie, if they really exist!
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: The withered branches on the first-floor planters have been cleaned up. This potted plant is the only one from the exhibit that survived.
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: I'll take it.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What about the underground 'plants'?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Transmitted data are as expected, but monitoring coverage is limited. We haven't had time to send someone to check on site.
attributes.name: Veteran Researcher

attributes.content: I'll go. Thanks.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Director Lunorey.
attributes.name: Underground Researcher

attributes.content: Anyone from outside here?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: No, ma'am. We've continued to simulate experimental conditions here.
attributes.name: Underground Researcher

attributes.content: Mm. Just in case...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) Reveal.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: No sign of entry... was it really an accident?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: We've compiled the report on the dead plants. Do you want to review it now?
attributes.name: Underground Researcher

attributes.content: Alright, let's go.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Nasti Lunorey, Director of Engineering. Credentials confirmed. Welcome.
attributes.name: Robotic Voice

attributes.content: Where the heck did those two go?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: Did something happen, sir?
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: No need to be alarmed. We're just simulating missions on the Shadow-Moon. Mr. Tannen's orders.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police B

attributes.content: Columbia keeps our people safe, wherever they are.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police B

attributes.content: (Split up. Keep a low profile.)
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police B

attributes.content: (Roger.)
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: So it was a drill... it's just like a Wrankwood blockbuster! What was it called...? Battlfield Shadow-Moon, I think?
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: See? Those guards are Kazimierzian space-knights. Don't give us away!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Skip the comedy, impostor. Where do you go next?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Not many places to hide on the Flying Donut station, while the ring corridor in the back is perfect for an ambush...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Then what do we do? I signed your tour contract, you gotta get me out of here!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Settle down, Real Oakley. You're on Propeller Paradise. Forget what you think you know about Terra Firma.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: That's a Volvort Kochinski jump-board you're testing, right? Can we borrow it?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Sure.
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: Huh? What's that sound?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: Look up!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police B

attributes.content: How the frick did they get on top of a floating pod?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: Oh, I forgot. People look up on Propeller Paradise.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: What do we do?!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Shoot them down!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: Oh! Is that simulating the air cannon the villain fires in the climactic scene?
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: Wait, I think I smell Originium powder...
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: Fire!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police A

attributes.content: Run!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Trash, all of them! It took so much work just to put Rhine down, but now we have a rogue tour guide on the loose...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I would have gone after that Feline myself, if I didn't have business to do.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Would you like me to eliminate those ignorant Terrans, Sky Conqueror? Show them true power from beyond Terra?
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: No need, Five-Four. She's a tour guide, not a special agent.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: First, report on Gustave.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: He and his retinue are floating around Cloud and the VIP area. They have passed through the ring corridor, but no one has found the hidden door yet.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Hah. When I first joined ATAO seven years ago, Gustave would notice if I swiped a liquid Originium lighter from a stowaway.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I thought he didn't like me because he used to be a soldier, hated crooks and wanted everything to be done the right way. Only later did I find out it was because I left too many loose ends.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I learned everything from him, his way of doing things, his way of talking, even how I dress. As for the result—
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: This pod holds treasures from across Terra.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: It's much bigger than ATAO's dirty lockers.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Gustave on one side, Nasti on the other. So what?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'm not the clueless kid from seven years ago. They'll never find out what I did, unless I hand-deliver the evidence.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Once the exhibition opens, and thousands of exhibits fly into the sky, all the 'secrets' and 'illicit transactions' won't matter anymore.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Every one will know that it was Gordon Tannen who lit the fire under Propeller Paradise. Not Rhine, not D.C.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Warning! Terran approaching!
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: What's that sound?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Don't blow it up... might be somebody... below...
Don't try to... talk... way out of...!
Gordon Tannen looks up in the smoke and dust as he forces his teary eyes open, trying to see just what is going on.
A familiar figure descends amidst the rubble and dust, her legs flailing wildly. He just ordered her arrest several hours ago.
They are only about ninety centimeters apart, both their brains working feverishly to process the situation.
Time itself feels frozen, as Gordon and Ferne stand off against one another, scrambling to take in each other's expressions.
(They really blew it up! Where the hell am I, anyway? This place isn't on my map! There was a hidden door in the ring corridor?)
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: (And why am I staring at Tannen right now? Was this a trap? But why is there such a look of surprise and shock on his face?)
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: (Are these exhibits on the walls?)
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: (Wait a second... I've definitely seen these Arts units at the street stalls when I got dragged into the black market by the Sarkaz. And that hat over there—isn't that standard issue for the Zhayedan in Sargonian tombs...?)
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: (Shoot, is it too late to pretend I never saw any of this?)
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: (Oh no, please don't hit the high-explosive Originite grenade, or this entire pod goes up in smoke!)
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (Dammit, it's been one thing after another since this fake guide came to Propeller Paradise!)
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (Is she Rhine's enemy, or Nasti's spy? She ruined my plans once at the Vivarium, and now she's doing it again!)
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (What's she looking at? The active Originium storm guide beacon, or the Zhayedan's witchcraft helmet? Shit, she recognizes these!)
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (What's she gonna do with the dirt on me? Is she gonna sell it to someone? If Nasti or Gustave find out...)
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: The delayed gravity pulls Ferne sharply downward. Gordon has no time to save his collection; all he can do is watch as the Feline approaches rapidly.
The distance between them disappears, as do the complicated thoughts flashing through their minds. As they await the impending impact, there is only time for them to say a single word—
Shit...
attributes.name: Gordon & Ferne
